prompt: Give me a rundown on this dataset

app_definition.app_description: High-level overview of app privacy risk metrics, customer segments, and supply chain performance for exploratory analysis.

components.title: Total Apps Profiled
components.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT app_id) AS total_apps FROM appmicroscope_data_clean_cert___appmicroscope_data_clean_cert;

components.title: Apps by Category (Binned)
components.sql_query: SELECT category_binned AS category, COUNT(DISTINCT app_id) AS app_count FROM appmicroscope_data_clean_cert___appmicroscope_data_clean_cert WHERE category_binned IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_binned ORDER BY app_count DESC;

components.title: Top Apps by Company Risk Score
components.sql_query: SELECT app_name, company_name, category_binned, company_risk_score, sdk_risk_score, permissions_risk_score FROM appmicroscope_data_clean_cert___appmicroscope_data_clean_cert WHERE company_risk_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY company_risk_score DESC LIMIT 50;

components.title: Total Supply Chain Cost Over Time
components.sql_query: SELECT order_date, SUM(total_cost + shipping_cost + warehouse_cost) AS total_supply_cost FROM supply_chain GROUP BY order_date ORDER BY order_date;

components.title: Average Defect Rate by Supplier
components.sql_query: SELECT supplier, AVG(defect_rate) AS avg_defect_rate FROM supply_chain GROUP BY supplier ORDER BY avg_defect_rate DESC;

components.title: Customer Segments Overview
components.sql_query: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, industry, company_size, revenue_category, region, satisfaction_score, last_order_date FROM customers ORDER BY last_order_date DESC;

components.title: Total Apps Profiled
components.explanation: Total Apps Profiled: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Average SDK Risk Score
components.explanation: Average SDK Risk Score: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Top Apps by Company Risk Score
components.explanation: Top Apps by Company Risk Score: Shows 50 rows across 6 columns

components.title: Total Supply Chain Cost Over Time
components.explanation: Total Supply Chain Cost Over Time: Shows trend across 365 time points

components.title: Average Defect Rate by Supplier
components.explanation: Average Defect Rate by Supplier: Compares 5 categories

components.title: Customer Segments Overview
components.explanation: Customer Segments Overview: Shows 20 rows across 8 columns

overview.summary: This dashboard gives you a high-level view of three areas in your dataset: app privacy risk, customer segments, and supply chain performance. You can see how many apps are being monitored and how risky they are on average, which categories dominate, and which specific apps and companies carry the highest risk. At the same time, you get a daily view of total supply chain costs and how supplier defect rates compare, alongside a snapshot of key customer profiles and satisfaction. Together, this lets you quickly understand the scale, risk profile, and operational context captured in the data.

components.title: Total Apps Profiled
components.narration: This KPI shows that you have 1,694 apps in scope, giving you a sense of the overall size of the app dataset being monitored for privacy and risk. It sets the baseline for interpreting all other app-related metrics.

components.title: Average SDK Risk Score
components.narration: This KPI indicates that, on average, apps have an SDK risk score of about 20.4, summarizing the typical third-party SDK risk level across your portfolio. You can use this as a benchmark to spot apps that are significantly above or below the norm.

components.title: Apps by Category (Binned)
components.narration: This chart shows how your 1,694 apps are distributed across categories, with Edtech dominating at 940 apps and the next largest groups being Other (175), Health & Fitness (132), Education (117), and Books (108). It helps you see where most of your app risk and analysis effort is likely concentrated by category.

components.title: Top Apps by Company Risk Score
components.narration: This table lists the 50 apps with the highest company risk scores, highlighting examples like Palm Beach County School Dist (Intrado Corporation) with a score of 509 and several high-risk Edtech and News & Magazines apps. You can see both SDK and permissions risk components, which helps you pinpoint which apps and vendors warrant immediate review.

components.title: Total Supply Chain Cost Over Time
components.narration: This line chart tracks your total supply chain cost by day, with sample values ranging from about $9,908 on 2024-01-04 to around $65,977 on 2024-01-02. It lets you see cost volatility and trends over the year so you can spot spikes, seasonality, or anomalies in operational spending.

components.title: Average Defect Rate by Supplier
components.narration: This chart compares average defect rates across key suppliers, showing that Acme Corp has the highest sample defect rate at about 2.61%, while BuildRight Inc is lowest at roughly 2.29%. It helps you quickly identify which suppliers are relatively more or less reliable in terms of quality.

components.title: Customer Segments Overview
components.narration: This table gives you a segmented view of customers by industry, size, revenue band, region, satisfaction, and last order date, such as SmartHome Inc (medium, $10M–$50M, Asia Pacific) with a satisfaction score of 4.8. You can use it to understand who your key customers are, where they operate, and how recently and happily they are engaging with you.
